prerequisites: A Convex account with an existing deployment (find it on the Convex dashboard).
The deployment URL for the target Convex deployment, shown on the dashboard General settings page (a .convex.cloud address such as https://acoustic-panther-728.convex.cloud).
A Convex deploy key generated for that deployment, used as the access_key. Deploy keys grant deployment admin access required for streaming import.

authMethods.name: Deploy key (access key)
authMethods.summary: Convex streaming import requires deployment admin authorization. The access_key config field holds a deploy key generated from the deployment's General settings page on the Convex dashboard. Convex sends it in the HTTP Authorization header with the value 'Convex <access_key>', which grants full read and write access to the deployment's data.

setupSteps.title: Locate your deployment URL
setupSteps.body: Open the Convex dashboard and go to the deployment's General settings page. Copy the deployment URL (the .convex.cloud address the deployment is hosted at). Enter it as the deployment_url config field.

setupSteps.title: Generate a deploy key
setupSteps.body: On the same Convex dashboard General settings page, generate a deploy key. Convex lets you customize each deploy key's permissions so you can grant only the access needed. Copy the generated key.

setupSteps.title: Provide the access key
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated deploy key into the access_key config field. Convex uses it for deployment admin authorization, sending it as the Authorization header value 'Convex <access_key>' on streaming import requests.

setupSteps.title: Save and verify
setupSteps.body: Save the connector configuration with both access_key and deployment_url set (both are required). The destination writes to the Convex deployment via the streaming import API using these credentials.

sources.title: Convex HTTP API - Convex Developer Hub
Create deploy key - Convex Developer Hub
